techniques.label:

Caching

techniques.label:
Multi-Turn
Caching

Routing
techniques.notes: Route simple tasks to Haiku ($0.80/M vs $3.00/M)

techniques.label:
Output
Budgeting
techniques.notes: Tight max_tokens per task type; output = 5x cost of input
